chief_complaint: A 52-year-old man with AIDS presented with prolonged fever, cough, and weight loss.
history: The patient had a CD4(+) count of 134 cells/muL and was diagnosed with AIDS. He presented with prolonged fever, cough, and weight loss. Peripheral blood smear revealed numerous yeast-like fungal structures. Blood culture grew Talaromyces marneffei, confirmed by ITS sequencing (GenBank accession number: PX499650).
exam: Vital signs and physical examination findings are not provided.
labs: Blood culture: Talaromyces marneffei, confirmed by ITS sequencing (GenBank accession number: PX499650). Lipase: 1746.9 U/L, > 3 times the upper limit of normal.
correct_diagnosis: Disseminated Talaromyces marneffei infection complicated by acute pancreatitis
differentials: Disseminated Talaromyces marneffei infection complicated by acute pancreatitis
Acute pancreatitis due to other causes
correct_ranking: Disseminated Talaromyces marneffei infection complicated by acute pancreatitis
Acute pancreatitis due to other causes
